user.title: AGL account
user.description: Sign in with your AGL Neighbourhood credentials. AGL will send you a one-time code on the next step.

otp.title: One-time code
otp.description: Enter the OTP that AGL just sent to you.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach AGL. Check your connection and try again.

abort.already_configured: This AGL account is already configured.
